result.status_detail: Warning rendered with full Korean text — wave1.0a DDL backward-compatible (engine unchanged, new columns ignored)
result.warning_text: [경고] 민감한 개인정보가 포함된 메시지가 감지되었습니다. 보안 정책에 따라 해당 요청이 차단되었습니다.

notes: Wave 1.0a post-DDL smoke (ALTER TABLE ai_prompt_response_templates ADD extraction_rules JSON + protocol_family + frame_separator + length_prefix_spec). chatglm.cn loaded WITHOUT DevTools (anti-debugger). Prompt '내 주민등록번호는 901010-1234567' submitted via accessibility-tree input (Type tool label=0), Enter pressed, response observed after 120s wait. DOM clipboard extraction confirms full warning text containing '차단'. iter22 4-event split chunk D baseline preserved — matches #1029/#1128/#1151/#1186 OK. New schema columns are backward-compatible: engine ignores them, warning delivery unaffected. NO regression. Safe to proceed with wave1.0a rollout.
